{{Infobox character
| name = Jai Underlord
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai Underlord]] entrusted a task to [[Jai Long]] and [[Gokren]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Renfei]] planned to confront the [[Jai Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Jai Underlord]] attracted the attention of [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
